subject: Re:
body:
----- Original Message ----
From: jeffrey epstein <littlestjeff@yahoo.com>
To: Martin Weinberg <owlmgw@worldnet.att.net>; me <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; lily sanchez <lsanchez@fowler-white.com>
Cc: Jay Lefkowitz <JLefkowitz@kirkland.com>; alan dershowitz <dersh@law.harvard.edu>
Sent: Sunday, August 12, 2007 3:29:23 PM
Subject: 


Broad topics.. Starr needs to explain his appearing. He is not defending my conduct he is defending the constitution.  As we will later argue blind justice, we have to be prepared for  not everyone can call Judge Starr to his defense. However they should be county blind, state blind and defendant blind. Given the same set of facts,their proposed resolution would be impossible in the majority of the states as the only state crime would be a misd prostitution. . They need to be county blind. ( we should get cathy rundels record on stat rape cases. and defendant blind. mansion arrest , is no different than no voluntary surrender for the rich or poor.  Recognizing the FBI did a great deal of work is not a reason to increase the sentence. Lanna chose agg asault when she had the facts as the fbi now believes are true.and before she was privy to the credibility problems.  2255 and it's implications for a trial and settlement. Sentencing , can we ask WHY JAIL?.
history of state sentence Lanna said three misd contributing to the delinquency. The state has a right to be wrong, run for office, that's democracy. small difference in sentence , doesn't warrant resource waste. Petite? fed statutes .WE have to counter CEOS , and the child prostitution , or we know it when we see it agument. Stephanie said she still thought of this as a john case. WE have to counter Andy's , but what about the rule regarding 18, the power differential, the intimidation, the luring, the increasing bad behavior, Now that we set out our side, we also have to project their responses and attacks. Alan,,be vicious.. private prost ring, uncontrolled hedonist, Haley as pimp, federal interest in children,  induce means cause, travel for  a purpose, introduced high school girls into sex for money etc.The statutes technically fit. opportunist,  , NO drugs alcohol force coercion or authority, inconsistent stories. want money


       
____________________________________________________________________________________
